title: fritillaria pinardii subsp. hajastanica
intro: Fritillaria pinardii subsp. hajastanica, also known as the Armenian fritillaria, is a species of flowering plant in the lily family, native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Fritillaria pinardii subsp. hajastanica include its ability to relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Fritillaria pinardii subsp. hajastanica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
